title: Cuneiform Tablet #0510: Middle Babylonian School Tablet
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a school tablet document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a school tablet document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Babylonian period. School Tablet document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records school tablet matters typical of Middle Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
